body: Just wanted to check in on my walnut cutting board order — is it still on track to ship this week?
Thanks for reaching out — your board is finished and ships from the shop in two business days. I'll send tracking once it's out.
One more thing — is the birdhouse kit glue-and-nail or does it need screws? Trying to figure out what tools we'll need.
It's pre-drilled and comes with wood glue and finishing nails — no power tools needed. Perfect for a project with the grandkids.
That's great, we'll take one. I'll place the order tonight.
Shipping to Columbus usually runs three to four business days once the item is made.
The cornhole set is made to order, so figure about a week of build time before it ships.
If it needs to arrive before the holidays, I'd get the order in by the end of the week to be safe.
Flagging this one to prioritize the build so we hit the holiday cutoff.
I'd like the last name 'Zielinski' engraved along the bottom edge. Is that something you can do?
Yes, we can add engraving — reply with the exact text and font you'd like and I'll quote it.
The broken hinge is the brass one on the left side of the lid. Do you sell those separately?
We keep those hinges in stock — happy to help. I'll drop a replacement in the mail today at no charge.
That's very kind of you, thank you. The toy chest has held up great otherwise.
I'd need about a dozen of the small maple boards for a craft fair in a few weeks. Any chance of a discount on that many?
For a dozen we can do 15% off and get them all finished the same batch. I'll put a quote together.
That works for me. Can they all be the same size, roughly 8 by 12 inches?
Noted — a dozen 8x12 maple boards, 15% bulk discount. Putting them on the production schedule.
The board I got is a dark walnut but I'd ordered the natural maple finish. Can we swap it?
Sorry about the mix-up — we'll get the right maple finish sent out and include a prepaid label for the return.
Looking to get a custom cornhole set for a family reunion the third weekend of next month. Is that doable?
That set is made to order, about a week of build time — if you order this week you'll have it well before the reunion.
Perfect, I'll get the order in tomorrow. Thanks for the quick reply.
Do you offer gift wrapping? The cheese board is a gift and I'd love it to arrive ready to give.
We do — kraft paper with twine and a handwritten gift note for a few dollars extra. Just add the note text at checkout.
Wonderful. Please add 'Happy Birthday, Mom' to the note. I'll place the order now.
Got it — cheese board, gift wrap, note reads 'Happy Birthday, Mom.' All set.
I ended up with two of the same cedar planter box after a checkout hiccup. How do I send one back?
No problem — I'll email a prepaid return label and refund the duplicate as soon as it's back at the shop.
Is the finish on the maple cutting board safe to prep food on, or is it just decorative?
It's finished with food-safe mineral oil and beeswax, so it's fine for cutting and prepping. Re-oil it every few months.
Good to know, thanks. I'll pick up some mineral oil to keep it in shape.
I'm up in Ontario — do you ship the Adirondack chair across the border, and roughly what would shipping run?
We can ship to Canada, though the chair is bulky so freight adds up. I'll work out a shipping quote to Ontario and send it over.
Understood on the freight. Send the quote along and I'll decide from there. Thanks!
Working up the cross-border freight quote for the Adirondack chair to Ontario.
